channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzanian Entrepreneur Bosco Chuwa Passes Away, Leaving Business Community in Mourning
item.description: The passing of Bosco Chuwa, a prominent Tanzanian businessman known as 'Mshtuko,' has sent shockwaves through the country's commercial sector. His death, confirmed approximately 13 hours ago, has left...

item.title: Cristiano Ronaldo's Emotional Response to Portugal's World Cup 2026 Exit
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo, the iconic Portuguese footballer, was seen battling emotions after his team Portugal was eliminated from the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The match against Spain in the Round of 16 ended wi...

item.title: Senator Cayetano to address Marcoleta's legal situation following arrest
item.description: Senator Francisco 'Isko' Cayetano has expressed his intention to personally visit Rodante Marcoleta, a former senator and businessman currently under investigation, following Marcoleta's recent arrest...

item.title: ONGA Dandano: Authentic Arewa Flavors for Northern Kitchens

item.title: U.S. Issues Travel Advisories for Venezuela Following Earthquakes and Security Concerns
item.description: The U.S. State Department has updated its travel advisories for Venezuela, citing recent earthquakes and heightened security risks. Following a magnitude 7.2 foreshock and a subsequent magnitude 7.5 e...

item.title: Legal Challenges Threaten Resilience of Indus Waters Treaty
item.description: The Indus Waters Treaty of 1960, a cornerstone of water-sharing between India and Pakistan, faces renewed scrutiny over its dispute resolution mechanisms. Legal experts warn that unilateral actions by...

item.title: Cuba's Ongoing Power Crisis Amid Fuel Shortages and Sanctions
item.description: Cuba is grappling with its third nationwide power outage in six months, exacerbating an already dire energy crisis. The state electricity company reported a total disconnection from the national grid,...

item.title: Deadly Crash on Sea-to-Sky Highway Closes Road for Hours
item.description: A fatal collision on the Sea-to-Sky Highway near the Deeks Creek Bridge, south of Porteau Cove, caused a multi-hour road closure on Sunday. Police confirmed the crash was fatal, though details remain ...
